description: Black track jacket that has mock collar, full front zipper closure, ribbed hem and cuffs, long sleeves, adidas patented 3-Stripes from the shoulders till the cuffs, two insert pockets on the sides and embroidered brand name and logo on the left chest Black track pant that has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, adidas patented 3-Stripe panels on the sides, zippered at the hem, two zippered side pockets, mesh lining, doggle straps at the hem, and embroidered brand name and logo on the left thigh
